CORE CAPABILITIES

Advanced Metal Finishing &
Precision Plating Solutions

Engineered surface treatments for critical components. Exact tolerances, enhanced durability, and uncompromising quality for aerospace, defence, and industrial applications.

Service Catalog

Nickel Plating
Excellent corrosion resistance and smooth, durable finish. Enhances component life and improves wear resistance.
Corrosion Resistant Automotive Electrical
Gold Plating
Superior conductivity and high corrosion resistance. Ideal for electrical and electronic components requiring precision.
High Conductivity Electronics Precision
Silver Plating
Excellent electrical conductivity and thermal performance. Used in electrical contacts and connectors.
Thermal Performance Connectors Contacts
Copper Plating
Improves conductivity and provides a strong base layer. Enhances adhesion for electrical and decorative applications.
Base Layer Electrical Decorative
Lead Plating
Effective corrosion resistance in harsh chemical environments. Protection against moisture and wear.
Chemical Resistant Industrial Specialist
Zinc Plating
Protects metal surfaces from rust and corrosion. Cost-effective solution ideal for fasteners and automotive parts.
Rust Protection Fasteners Automotive
Brass Plating
Attractive finish with moderate corrosion resistance for decorative and functional components.
Decorative Functional Moderate Protection
Chrome Plating
Bright, hard finish with excellent wear and corrosion resistance. Ideal for high-durability components.
Hard Finish Wear Resistant Aesthetic
Tin & Tin-Lead Plating
Excellent solderability and corrosion resistance. Used in electronic assemblies for consistent performance.
Solderability Electronics Assemblies
Powder Coating
Durable, uniform and attractive finish. Strong resistance against corrosion, chemicals and wear.
Industrial Decorative Chemical Resistant

Processing Specs

Plating ProcessesElectroplating, Electroless Plating, Anodizing, Electro Coating
Coating ProcessesPowder Coating, Abrasive Finishing
Materials PlatedSteel, Aluminium, Copper, Brass, Zinc Die Cast
Production VolumeSmall batch to high-volume bulk production
Pre-Plate OpsDegreasing, Acid Pickling, Electro Cleaning
Post-Plate OpsPassivation, Chromate Conversion, Hydrogen Relief
Quality ControlIn-house lab, bath chemistry monitoring, thickness measurement
DeliveryOn-time commitment. Emergency services available.
Lead TimesQuoted per job. JIT available.
